struct MetricsClient {
    endpoint: String,
}

fn init_metrics() -> MetricsClient {
    MetricsClient {
        endpoint: "https://metrics.example.com".to_string(),
    }
}

// GOOD: feature-gated initialization
#[cfg(feature = "metrics")]
static METRICS: std::sync::OnceLock<MetricsClient> = std::sync::OnceLock::new();

#[cfg(feature = "metrics")]
fn get_metrics() -> Option<&'static MetricsClient> {
    Some(METRICS.get_or_init(|| init_metrics()))
}

#[cfg(not(feature = "metrics"))]
fn get_metrics() -> Option<&'static MetricsClient> {
    None
}

async fn handle_request() {
    if let Some(metrics) = get_metrics() {
        // only initialized when feature is enabled
    }
}
